queryExamples: How much are we spending monthly?
Which vendors put us over budget?
What can we cut to get under budget?
notes: Confirmed from Gmail receipts and the subscription audit tracker; unresolved usage-based tools still require dashboard verification.
Recent quick enrollments/cancellations may make next-month realized spend lower than this snapshot.
2026-05-10 provider refresh kept the budget status yellow: no cancellation approval was requested and no vendor crossed the cancellation threshold.
2026-05-11 weekly refresh kept the budget status yellow: n8n, Supabase, and Vercel showed fresh operational movement; no vendor crossed the cancellation threshold.
2026-05-12 daily refresh kept the budget status yellow: n8n and Supabase moved again, Vercel project metadata did not refresh from CLI output, and no vendor crossed the cancellation threshold.

2026-05-13 daily refresh kept the budget status yellow: n8n, Supabase, Vercel, Stripe, and HeyGen had live read-only signals; OpenRouter stayed zero-usage and no vendor crossed the cancellation threshold.
Cancellation remains approval-gated; this budget view is read-only.

2026-05-14 daily refresh kept the budget status yellow: Supabase, n8n, Stripe, Slack, OpenAI, and Anthropic had live read-only signals; OpenRouter stayed zero-usage, Vapi stayed quiet since 2026-04-30, Read.ai/Calendly auth remained blocked, and no vendor crossed the cancellation threshold.

2026-05-15 daily refresh kept the budget status yellow: Supabase, n8n, Stripe, Slack, OpenAI, Anthropic, Apify, HeyGen, Pinecone, Printful, and ElevenLabs had live read-only signals; OpenRouter stayed zero-usage, Vapi returned no current sampled calls, Read.ai/Calendly auth remained blocked, Gemini returned 403, and no vendor crossed the cancellation threshold.

transitionAdjustments.rationale: Claude Max appears in the current receipt-backed run-rate, but the ChatGPT switch should remove this line from the next settled cycle if cancellation remains in place.

apifyCallAnalysis.lastMonitorExecution: Direct provider refresh on 2026-05-15 still reports Apify STARTER; latest account-level run sample was 2026-05-13, and prior actor sample through 2026-05-06 remains the active replacement-analysis evidence.
apifyCallAnalysis.nextAction: Keep productive evidence actors under watch, pause or replace no-run/failing/empty-output actors, and compare the remaining productive categories against cheaper alternatives before renewal.

actorRunHistory.label: Facebook friends
actorRunHistory.recommendation: Pause unless a campaign-owned Facebook source is explicitly active; browser/manual review is safer before re-enabling.

actorRunHistory.label: Facebook groups
actorRunHistory.recommendation: Pause by default and replace with manual group review or approved community exports if needed.

actorRunHistory.label: Facebook comments
actorRunHistory.recommendation: Pause unless a specific post-engagement campaign justifies a controlled run.

actorRunHistory.label: LinkedIn connections
actorRunHistory.recommendation: Replace or keep disabled; repeated failures with zero output make this a poor use of Apify.

actorRunHistory.label: LinkedIn post engagement
actorRunHistory.recommendation: Investigate input quality before keeping; success with zero items is not useful output.

actorRunHistory.label: Reddit listening
actorRunHistory.recommendation: Keep for now; run a bakeoff against Reddit API/RSS/search before replacing.

actorRunHistory.label: Google Maps
actorRunHistory.recommendation: Keep only if Google Places API or manual CSV cannot produce equivalent accepted evidence.

actorRunHistory.label: LinkedIn post search
actorRunHistory.recommendation: Keep as the strongest current Apify value signal; compare against browser-agent sampling.

actorRunHistory.label: G2 reviews
actorRunHistory.recommendation: Replace with manual/source-registered review capture unless the actor can return non-empty datasets.

actorRunHistory.label: Capterra reviews
actorRunHistory.recommendation: Keep only for targeted evidence collection; run a manual/browser-search replacement test.

actorRunHistory.label: Profile enrichment
actorRunHistory.recommendation: Remove from active watch if the older HeyGen cold-email flow is retired.

actorRunHistory.label: Website screenshot/video
actorRunHistory.recommendation: Replace with local Playwright/Browser Use/Vercel Chromium capture if website capture is still needed.

lineItems.budgetAction: Keep under watch during outreach ramp; largest cut lever if client-volume evidence does not justify it.

lineItems.budgetAction: Keep while workflows remain active; optimize workflow errors separately.
Keep on watch; run Apify actor bakeoff before renewal to test cheaper or better replacements.

lineItems.budgetAction: Review after the next video campaign.
Keep an eye on usage; continue comparing against Codex/PPTX and other deck paths.

lineItems.budgetAction: Watch through the next social/audio cycle.

summary.headline: Daily refresh: Supabase, n8n, Stripe, Slack, OpenAI, Anthropic, Apify, HeyGen, Pinecone, Printful, and ElevenLabs showed live readable signals; quiet watch items stayed gated and no vendor reached the cancellation threshold.
nextReviewFocus: Refresh Read AI and Calendly auth before using those providers as usage evidence.
Retire or rotate the stale n8n API key only after confirming which runtime still references it.
Confirm OpenRouter's role in the next media/model bakeoff before preparing any deprecation packet.
Verify whether Resend exists in Vercel production env or billing.
Confirm Vapi dashboard billing and intended production voice UX.
Check Pinecone billing/API traffic against Supabase/local RAG.
Check Printful dashboard order history and active store strategy.
Check Gemini/Google AI key and project status after the model-list check returned 403.
Review ElevenLabs renewal before 2026-05-19 against the next planned campaign.
Continue the Apify actor-level replacement bakeoff by pausing weak surfaces before account-level changes.

vendors.name: Vapi
vendors.billingSignal: Dashboard billing still needs verification; direct API returned zero calls in the default 2026-05-15 sample; prior visible call remains 2026-04-30.
vendors.usageSignal: Vapi Calls API returned no current sampled calls; prior visible evidence remains a 2026-04-30 webCall and code/env/webhook references remain.
vendors.portfolioDependency: Voice/audit experience risk if production voice UX is enabled.
vendors.recommendation: Investigate billing and intended voice UX; no cancellation action without a dashboard/billing decision.
vendors.nextAction: Check Vapi dashboard billing and decide whether the voice path should stay enabled.

vendors.name: BuiltWith
vendors.billingSignal: Receipts found on 2026-04-10 in the prior billing pass.
vendors.usageSignal: Local repo references remain active and the protected outreach-ramp watch decision still applies; 2026-05-15 repo scan found 248 non-tracker references.
vendors.portfolioDependency: Tech-stack lookup/enrichment supports lead prep, implementation strategy, and feasibility assessment.
vendors.recommendation: Keep active during outreach ramp; reassess after more leads, audits, proposals, and client outcomes.
vendors.nextAction: Compare outcomes where BuiltWith enrichment improves sales preparation or proposal quality.

vendors.name: Fireflies.ai
vendors.billingSignal: Refund found on 2026-03-20; Vambah confirmed canceled on 2026-05-01.
vendors.usageSignal: No new paid-plan evidence appeared in the 2026-05-15 audit.
vendors.portfolioDependency: No direct Portfolio repo integration found in the latest audit.
vendors.recommendation: Keep out of active cancellation queue unless new paid-plan evidence appears.
vendors.nextAction: No action unless a new Fireflies receipt or paid-plan signal appears.

vendors.name: Vercel
vendors.billingSignal: Prior receipt evidence remains; CLI access is authenticated as vsillah.
vendors.usageSignal: 2026-05-15 plain CLI listing returned current deployment URLs for both portfolio and portfolio-staging; the CLI no longer accepted the prior --json listing flag.
vendors.nextAction: Keep deployment monitoring and billing-owner documentation current.

vendors.name: Printful
vendors.billingSignal: Likely usage/order based; no fixed subscription evidence confirmed.
vendors.usageSignal: Printful API returned two native stores again; one historical Printful-linked order exists; printful_sync_log remains empty in the 2026-05-15 Supabase refresh.
vendors.portfolioDependency: Store fulfillment and merchandise sync risk.
vendors.recommendation: Investigate dashboard order history and merchandise strategy before any deprecation decision.
vendors.nextAction: Check Printful dashboard/store order history and whether both stores remain active.

vendors.name: Resend
vendors.billingSignal: No live key or billing evidence confirmed in this run; local RESEND_API_KEY was absent.
vendors.usageSignal: Optional transactional provider remains in env templates/code, but latest production email evidence still points to n8n/Gmail-era transport.
vendors.portfolioDependency: Transactional email delivery risk if production is configured to use Resend.
vendors.recommendation: Verify production env and billing before keeping as a paid dependency or removing.
vendors.nextAction: Confirm whether production uses Resend or Gmail/n8n as the real outbound channel.

vendors.name: Pinecone
vendors.billingSignal: Billing/API traffic not confirmed; direct API showed active infrastructure again on 2026-05-15.
vendors.usageSignal: One ready serverless publications index exists in aws/us-east-1; n8n RAG references and local/Supabase RAG rows also remain.
vendors.recommendation: Investigate billing/API traffic and compare with Supabase/local RAG replacement path.
vendors.nextAction: Verify whether current RAG traffic still depends on Pinecone before any deprecation.

vendors.name: Apify
vendors.billingSignal: Prior invoice evidence remains; direct API still reports STARTER plan on 2026-05-15.
vendors.usageSignal: n8n exports include Apify nodes; direct account-level sample showed a succeeded actor run from 2026-05-13, and prior direct run history still shows actor-level sampled runs through 2026-05-06 with four useful categories plus eight weak surfaces.
vendors.portfolioDependency: Lead sourcing, scraping, and actor-monitor automation.
vendors.recommendation: Keep account-level subscription for now; pause or replace weak actor surfaces before any account-level decision.
vendors.nextAction: Continue actor-level replacement tests for no-run, failing, and empty-output surfaces before renewal.

vendors.name: Hunter.io
vendors.billingSignal: Direct API returned plan Free with 75 available calls on 2026-05-15.
vendors.usageSignal: HUNTER_API_KEY, lead-source references, and n8n Hunter node-swap docs are present.
vendors.portfolioDependency: Lead discovery and email enrichment workflow risk.
vendors.recommendation: Keep/watch; not a paid cancellation target unless the account upgrades or becomes redundant.
vendors.nextAction: Recheck only if Hunter.io moves from Free to paid or lead workflows stop using it.

vendors.name: OpenRouter
vendors.billingSignal: Direct API returned zero current-key usage again on 2026-05-15 and no confirmed active spend.
vendors.usageSignal: OPENROUTER_API_KEY, media bakeoff references, and n8n OpenRouter nodes remain present.
vendors.portfolioDependency: Specialist model-routing path for image/media and draft-reply workflows.
vendors.recommendation: Watch until bakeoff evidence confirms whether it is active, sandbox-only, or replaceable.
vendors.nextAction: If unused again, prepare a deprecation packet after the media/model bakeoff rather than canceling automatically.

vendors.name: ElevenLabs
vendors.billingSignal: Direct API reports active Creator subscription on 2026-05-15; prior receipt evidence remains; next character reset remains 2026-05-19T18:38:26Z.
vendors.usageSignal: Direct API reports 18,068 of 164,102 characters used; social/audio workflow references remain.
vendors.portfolioDependency: Audio generation for social/video content campaigns.
vendors.recommendation: Watch through the next social content cycle before renewal review.
vendors.nextAction: Confirm next campaign audio usage before the 2026-05-19 renewal window.

vendors.name: Read.ai
vendors.billingSignal: Prior receipt evidence remains; 2026-05-15 direct API meeting-list check returned 401.
vendors.usageSignal: Supabase meeting rows, docs, and Read.ai workflow references remain; live provider usage needs auth refresh.
vendors.portfolioDependency: Meeting transcript and follow-up intelligence workflow risk.
vendors.recommendation: Keep while meeting transcript workflow is active; refresh auth before drawing new usage conclusions.
vendors.nextAction: Refresh Read AI auth and re-run meeting usage check.

vendors.name: Calendly
vendors.billingSignal: Prior receipt evidence remains; 2026-05-15 direct API user lookup returned 401.
vendors.usageSignal: Scheduling links, n8n Calendly triggers, and report scheduling code remain active in the repo.
vendors.portfolioDependency: Client scheduling and lifecycle automation risk.
vendors.recommendation: Keep as low-cost scheduling infrastructure unless a replacement path is approved.
vendors.nextAction: Refresh Calendly token and re-run event-type usage check.

vendors.name: Gemini / Google AI
vendors.billingSignal: No direct billing evidence confirmed; 2026-05-15 model-list check returned 403.
vendors.usageSignal: Gemini key is present locally and n8n/social image workflow references remain, but current API auth/project status needs verification.
vendors.portfolioDependency: Image/social generation workflow risk if Gemini remains part of active n8n pipelines.
vendors.recommendation: Investigate key/project status before treating Gemini as a reliable active provider or cancellation target.
vendors.nextAction: Check Google AI Studio or Google Cloud project status and refresh the Gemini key if the image workflows stay active.

vendors.name: Anthropic
vendors.billingSignal: Receipt-backed current run-rate includes Anthropic, but the ChatGPT transition should remove it next cycle if cancellation holds; direct model-list endpoint was readable on 2026-05-15.
vendors.usageSignal: Anthropic code and n8n workflow references remain, including evaluation and social-listening paths.
vendors.portfolioDependency: LLM fallback/evaluation path risk if removed before bakeoff decisions settle.
vendors.recommendation: Watch through the next receipt and model bakeoff refresh before deprecation.
vendors.nextAction: Confirm whether Anthropic remains canceled or still needed as a fallback after the ChatGPT switch.
